firstImage: A tight portrait of a young East Asian woman showcasing smooth, flawless skin, deep brown eyes, and neatly shaped light brown eyebrows. She holds a sleek silver and grey eyebrow pen in her right hand, carefully shaping the outer edge of her right eyebrow. Her dark hair is styled back from her face, bathed in soft, diffused lighting that highlights her calm and attentive expression against a gently blurred, pale backdrop.
shots:
[Indoor - Daytime] | Mei, a young East Asian woman with fair skin, dark brown eyes, and light brown brows, delicately applies a silver and grey eyebrow pen to her right brow. | text overlay: [ウォータープルーフアイブロウペンシル、汗や油に強い] | Close-up, eye-level shot featuring soft, balanced lighting.

[Indoor - Daytime] | Mei continues to outline the outer section of her right eyebrow with the pen, then slowly lowers it. A bright orange animated arrow points at her brow. | | Close-up, eye-level shot with gentle, even lighting.

[Indoor - Daytime] | Mei uses her left hand to sweep back hair at her temple while filling in thin spots along her hairline with the silver and grey pen. An orange animated arrow highlights the hairline. | text overlay: [ヘアラインの薄い部分をカバー] | Close-up, eye-level shot with soft, neutral lighting.

[Indoor - Daytime] | Mei completes the hairline touch-up and lowers her gaze slightly, revealing natural makeup and a focused look. | | Close-up, eye-level shot with soft, even illumination.
idea1_firstImage: Extreme close-up, macro shot of a Japanese woman's eyebrow, meticulously drawn with a dark brown eyebrow pencil. Tiny, glistening water droplets are forming and beading up on the skin and eyebrow hairs, clearly not smudging or running the makeup. The skin is smooth and natural-looking, with soft, diffused natural daylight illuminating the scene from the side, creating subtle highlights on the water droplets. Shallow depth of field, focused sharply on the droplets and brow, blurring the background slightly. Realistic, high-resolution detail showing individual brow hairs and skin texture.
idea1_video: A gentle mist of water or a few small droplets are delicately applied to the finished eyebrow. The camera slowly pushes in, revealing the water beading up and rolling off the brow, without disturbing or smudging the precisely drawn eyebrow lines. This visually demonstrates the product's strong waterproof quality and resistance to sweat.
idea2_firstImage: Close-up, medium shot of a Japanese woman's temple area where her dark brown hair meets her forehead. The camera focuses on a slightly sparse section of her hairline, before product application, showing fine, light baby hairs and the natural skin beneath. Soft, even natural daylight from the front gently illuminates her face, highlighting the natural texture of her hair. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned interior wall, consistent with the main video's environment. Shallow depth of field, creating a sense of natural realism.
idea2_video: The shot begins with a focus on a slightly sparse area of the hairline. A hand holding the eyebrow pencil (used for hairline) gently sweeps across the area with small, light, hair-like strokes. The camera subtly tracks the pencil's movement, then pulls back slightly to reveal the previously sparse area now looking visibly fuller and more seamlessly blended with the rest of the hair, emphasizing the natural gap-filling ability.
idea3_firstImage: Extreme close-up, macro shot of the tip of the silver eyebrow pencil being held by a slender, manicured Japanese hand. The soft, dark brown brush tip is in sharp focus, showing its fine, individual bristles ready for application. The background is a very shallow depth of field, showing a blurred hint of natural skin (perhaps the back of a hand or forehead) where the product is about to be applied, creating a soft, warm glow from diffused natural light. The metallic sheen of the pencil body is subtly visible. Realistic, high-definition photography.
idea3_video: The camera focuses tightly on the brush tip of the eyebrow pencil. The brush then makes a clean, smooth stroke onto a section of bare skin (like the back of a hand or temple area, out of focus initially), demonstrating the even and precise pigment release. The camera then slightly pans or tilts to show the fine, natural-looking line created, emphasizing the precision and ease of application for both eyebrows and hairline, highlighting its versatile and user-friendly design.
